clear_blue_alpha.description: Clear framebuffer to blue with 50% alpha

clear_then_scissor.description: Clear to blue, enable scissor, clear inner rect to red

viewport_partial.description: Draw fullscreen quad with viewport set to left half — right half stays black

triangle_solid.description: Solid red triangle on black background

triangle_colored.description: Triangle with per-vertex RGB colors interpolated

triangle_uniform_color.description: Triangle with color set via uniform

blend_alpha.description: Two overlapping triangles with alpha blending

depth_test_ordering.description: Two triangles at different Z depths, closer one should occlude

indexed_draw.description: Quad drawn with drawElements using index buffer

scissor_triangle.description: Triangle clipped by scissor rect (right half visible)

viewport_quarter.description: Triangle rendered in bottom-right quarter viewport

depth_three_layers.description: Three overlapping triangles at different Z depths

blend_three_layers.description: Three overlapping alpha-blended triangles on white background

large_triangle_clip.description: Oversized triangle extending beyond viewport boundaries

fullscreen_quad.description: Solid quad covering entire viewport via indexed draw

two_quads_indexed.description: Two separate quads from one vertex/index buffer

colored_quad_indexed.description: Per-vertex colored quad drawn with index buffer

multi_draw_uniform.description: Two triangles drawn with different uniform colors

depth_back_to_front.description: Draw far triangle last — depth test should still reject it

cull_face_back.description: Two triangles: front-facing visible (green), back-facing culled. With GL_CULL_FACE + GL_BACK.

additive_blend.description: Three overlapping triangles with additive blending (GL_ONE, GL_ONE) on black background

triangle_strip_quad.description: Quad drawn as GL_TRIANGLE_STRIP (4 vertices, 2 triangles) with per-vertex color

mvp_transform.description: Triangle transformed by a 4x4 matrix (90-degree Z rotation + scale 0.5)

depth_mask_transparent.description: Opaque red quad with depth write, then transparent blue triangle without depth write, then green triangle behind

triangle_fan_pentagon.description: Regular pentagon drawn as GL_TRIANGLE_FAN with center vertex

blend_multiply.description: Two overlapping triangles with multiplicative blending (GL_DST_COLOR, GL_ZERO)

perspective_triangle.description: Triangle with perspective projection matrix (w != 1), testing perspective divide and correct interpolation

depth_lequal.description: Two coplanar triangles at same depth; second drawn with LEQUAL overwrites first

cull_face_front.description: Front-face culling: CW (back-facing) triangle visible, CCW (front-facing) triangle culled

varying_alpha.description: Triangle with per-vertex RGBA colors (4-component varying) with alpha blending

multi_texture.description: Two quads with different textures bound between draw calls

depth_less_coplanar.description: Two overlapping triangles at slightly different depths with GL_LESS — second (green) is behind first (red) and should be occluded in overlap region

perspective_textured_quad.description: Textured quad viewed through a perspective matrix (w != 1). Tests perspective-correct UV interpolation.

indexed_triangle_strip.description: Quad drawn as indexed GL_TRIANGLE_STRIP via drawElements

three_attrib_pos_uv_color.description: Triangle with 3 vertex attributes: position (attrib 0), texcoord (attrib 1), color tint (attrib 2). Shader multiplies texture color by vertex tint.

viewport_offset_triangle.description: Triangle rendered into a viewport offset from origin (viewport x=50, y=50)

scissor_blend.description: Alpha-blended triangle clipped by scissor rect — only the scissored portion blends over background

grid_mesh.description: 5x5 grid of colored quads drawn as indexed triangles — stress test for many-triangle correctness

reversed_z.description: Reversed-Z rendering: clearDepth(0), depthFunc(GREATER). Near triangle at z=0.8, far triangle at z=-0.5 — near wins.

linear_texture_filter.description: Textured quad with GL_LINEAR filtering — should show smooth bilinear interpolation

discard_alpha_cutout.description: Fragment shader using discard for alpha cutout — left half of triangle should be transparent

draw_lines.description: GL_LINES mode — two colored line segments forming a cross

draw_points.description: GL_POINTS mode — three colored points with gl_PointSize

unpack_flip_y_texture.description: Texture uploaded with UNPACK_FLIP_Y_WEBGL — top/bottom rows should be flipped vs normal upload

color_mask_red_only.description: colorMask blocks green and blue channels — white triangle appears red

blend_func_separate.description: blendFuncSeparate with different RGB and alpha blend factors

unsigned_int_indices.description: Indexed draw using GL_UNSIGNED_INT (u32) indices instead of GL_UNSIGNED_SHORT

texture_wrap_repeat.description: Textured quad with UV > 1.0 and GL_REPEAT wrap — should tile the texture 2x2

phong_lit_sphere.description: Blinn-Phong lit sphere — per-fragment lighting with diffuse + specular

procedural_gradient_sky.description: Procedural gradient sky with horizon and sun glow — pure fragment shader math

sdf_rounded_rect.description: SDF rounded rectangle — signed distance field UI element rendering

procedural_stripes.description: Procedural diagonal stripe pattern — sin/smoothstep/mix fragment math

multi_object_scene.description: 6 colored triangles in a grid — multi-draw with uniform changes per object

alpha_blended_particles.description: 8 alpha-blended soft-circle particles — SDF circle in fragment, overlapping transparency

depth_and_blend_combined.description: Opaque floor with transparent overlays — standard opaque-then-transparent rendering pipeline

wireframe_overlay.description: Wireframe overlay — solid triangle drawn first, then LINES edges on top

scissor_multipass.description: 4-quadrant scissor multipass — separate viewport/scissor per region, different colors

instanced_cube_grid.description: 3x3 grid of colored cubes with perspective and depth — tests instanced-style multi-draw with 3D geometry

two_texture_units.description: Fullscreen quad sampling two texture units (red+blue) blended 50/50 via mix()

uniform4fv_color.description: Triangle with color set via uniform4fv (vec4)

uniform3fv_color.description: Triangle with color set via uniform3fv (vec3)

uniform2fv_offset.description: Fullscreen quad with UV offset via uniform2fv (vec2)

bench_terrain_lit.description: 32x32 terrain grid (1089 verts, 2048 tris) with Phong lighting — vertex throughput benchmark

bench_cubes_lit_25.description: 5x5 grid of Phong-lit cubes (25 draw calls, 900 tris) — draw call + uniform update benchmark

bench_raymarched_spheres.description: Fullscreen raymarching with 8 SDF objects, soft shadows, Phong shading — fragment shader throughput benchmark

bench_particles_256.description: 256 alpha-blended soft-circle particles (1536 verts) in single draw — blending + fill rate benchmark

bench_normal_perturb.description: Fullscreen per-pixel normal perturbation with multi-octave height field — fragment math throughput benchmark

stencil_mask_basic.description: Stencil test: draw triangle to stencil, then fullscreen quad only where stencil==1

stencil_outline.description: Stencil outline: draw triangle to stencil, then larger triangle where stencil!=1

polygon_offset_zbias.description: Polygon offset resolves z-fighting between coplanar triangles

blend_equation_separate.description: blendEquationSeparate with FUNC_ADD for RGB and FUNC_SUBTRACT for alpha

color_mask_channels.description: colorMask(true,false,false,true) makes white triangle appear red

stencil_incr_decr.description: Stencil INCR accumulation: two overlapping triangles increment stencil, fullscreen quad where stencil==2 (overlap only) (KNOWN: wgpu pipeline layout crash with stencil-only shaders)

stencil_invert.description: Stencil INVERT: write 1 to stencil with triangle, invert overlapping region, render where stencil==0 (inverted area) (KNOWN: wgpu pipeline layout crash with stencil-only shaders)

stencil_notequal.description: Stencil NOTEQUAL: draw small triangle to stencil (ref=1), render fullscreen quad where stencil!=1 (everything except triangle) (KNOWN: wgpu pipeline layout crash with stencil-only shaders)

stencil_depth_interaction.description: Stencil + depth test together: front triangle writes stencil, back triangle tests depth — validates no interference

blend_colormask_combined.description: Blend + colorMask combined: alpha blending with blue channel write disabled — blue stays at clear color

depth_fighting_close_planes.description: Two triangles at z=0.0 and z=0.001 — tests depth precision with very close planes

depth_lequal_equal_z.description: Two triangles at identical z with depthFunc LEQUAL — second draw should overwrite first

polygon_offset_decal.description: Polygon offset decal: large triangle, then coplanar smaller triangle with negative offset renders on top

line_strip_colored.description: LINE_STRIP with per-vertex colors — validates line rendering path

points_varying_position.description: POINTS at several positions with per-vertex colors — validates point sprite rendering

uniform_change_between_draws.description: Uniform update between draws: first triangle red, second triangle blue — validates uniform state changes

tex_subimage_update.description: texSubImage2D partial update: create 4x4 texture, update 2x2 region, draw textured quad — validates partial texture upload

stub_flush_between_draws.description: Red left half, flush(), green right half

stub_compressed_tex_no_crash.description: Texture create/delete (compressed tex is JS no-op), then render

stub_get_tex_parameter.description: Create texture, set/get parameter, then render
